title: Perdure Guard Status
description: A compact status line for a guard session (`perdure guard status --json`). The single bit an integrator trusts is `verified`; the counts make the verdict auditable at a glance (how many required commands there are, how many passed, how many out-of-scope edits are currently present, and how many receipts have been minted).

phase.description: Session phase: open, verified, committed, or aborted.

verified.description: True only when every required command passed AND no out-of-scope file changed.

commands_required.description: How many commands the goal requires to pass.

commands_passed.description: How many required commands passed on the last verify.

out_of_scope.description: How many changed files currently fall outside the goal's fs.write scope.

receipts.description: How many command receipts this session has minted.

step.description: The session's cumulative durable-effect step counter.
